ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-03-2024 Continued To Aug-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 21, 2019 is admitted to probate. Christopher Rose is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 3, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
